data.title: Aalo Atomics partners with Baker Hughes for 10 MWe turbine for Aalo-X nuclear reactor, boosting their path to full operation.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Aalo Atomics has chosen Baker Hughes to supply a 10 MWe steam turbine generator set and related systems for their modular nuclear plants. The steam turbine will be utilized in Aalo's experimental reactor, Aalo-X, to power modern AI data centers, marking a milestone for the company as one of the pioneering advanced reactors in this field. This partnership signifies a strategic move towards innovative energy solutions for data centers.

data.title: Ocugen (NASDAQ: OCGN) reported Q4 earnings of $-0.06 EPS, missing estimates by 0.0%. Revenue decreased by $957 thousand.
data.description: Ocugen (NASDAQ: OCGN) released its Q4 earnings on Wednesday, March 4, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The company reported an EPS of $-0.06, missing estimated earnings by 0.0% which was also $-0.06. Additionally, their revenue decreased by $957 thousand compared to the previous year. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fairway Private Equity & VC Opportunities Fund reports a 5.02% increase in Q4 2025, with a full year return of 15.91%. A 3-year return of 13.77%. Annualized return since inception at 8.62%. S&P 500 index returns at 2.66%, 17.88%, 23.01%.
data.description: Fairway Capital Management announced today that their Fairway Private Equity & Venture Capital Opportunities Fund saw a 5.02% increase in Net Asset Value for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The Fund delivered a return of 15.91% for the year ending December 31, 2025, and a return of 13.77% for the three-year period ending December 31, 2025. Since its inception on December 29, 2021, the Fund has achieved an annualized return of 8.62%. In comparison, the S&P 500 index returned 2.66%, 17.88%, and 23.01%.

data.title: Tyfone introduces Loanovia at GAC 2026, offering lending solutions used in 80+ credit unions for automation & cost reduction.
data.description: In Washington, Tyfone, a digital banking solutions provider, unveiled Loanovia at the Governmental Affairs Conference 2026. Loanovia is a new loan servicing and payments business unit that offers a suite of lending solutions including Skip-A-Pay, Quick Pay, and Collect. These solutions have already been utilized in over 80 applications across various credit unions in the country. Loanovia's primary focus is to assist credit unions in automating payment processes, cutting operational costs, and enhancing efficiency.

data.title: Sensata Technologies introduces FaultBreak™ Contactor in UK to enhance EV safety; a high voltage switching solution for improved reliability and simplicity.
data.description: In Swindon, United Kingdom, Sensata has introduced the FaultBreak contactor, an advanced high voltage switching and protection solution aimed at enhancing safety, fault clearing, and simplifying electric vehicle (EV) systems. This innovative product is designed to address the growing demand for efficient and reliable EV components.

data.title: Mary Kay achieves ISO 22716 certification for global manufacturing standards, emphasizing quality. #ISO #GoldStandard
data.description: Dallas-based beauty company, Mary Kay, has recently attained ISO 22716 certification, showcasing its commitment to global manufacturing standards. The certification underlines Mary Kay's dedication to quality and safety in its production processes. ISO 22716 specifies requirements for a quality management system aimed at cosmetics manufacturing. This achievement reflects Mary Kay's focus on adhering to rigorous standards, ensuring the highest level of product quality for consumers worldwide.

data.title: Ocugen releases latest business update along with Q4 and FY 2025 financial results.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is expected to shrink by 4.4% in 2020 due to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. This marks the worst economic recession since the Great Depression of the 1930s. The report also highlighted that the global trade volumes are predicted to plummet by around 8.4% this year. Furthermore, it is estimated that over 300 million jobs have been lost worldwide during this crisis, with the unemployment rate projected to reach 9.2%. In order to mitigate the economic fallout, governments around the world have implemented various stimulus packages amounting to over $11 trillion. Despite these efforts, the road to economic recovery remains uncertain as countries continue to grapple with the impacts of the pandemic.

data.title: Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (BF) Q3 earnings report: EPS beat by 23.4% at $0.58 vs $0.47 estimate; revenue up $21M.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, at 08:00 AM, the Q3 earnings report was disclosed for Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE: BF). The earnings surpassed expectations by 23.4%, with an EPS of $0.58 compared to the estimated $0.47. Revenue exhibited a $21.00 million increase from the previous year's corresponding period. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
